title: centella affinis
intro: Centella affinis, also known as Gotu Kola, is a plant native to Asia and Australia, belonging to the Apiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is known to improve circulation and enhance wound healing. The health benefits of Centella affinis include improving cognitive function, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Centella affinis is commonly used in teas, capsules, and topical creams, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
